global_description: Marine animal with a soft, bulbous body, eight long, flexible arms lined with suckers, smooth skin, typically in shades of gray, brown, or reddish, capable of changing color and texture for camouflage.

part_details.body: Soft, bulbous, smooth skin, often gray or brown
part_details.arms: Eight long, flexible, lined with suckers
part_details.suckers: Circular, located along the underside of arms
part_details.skin: Smooth, capable of changing color and texture

spatial_relations: Suckers line the underside of arms
Body is central with arms radiating outward
